# Zithelo Real Estate Limited

> Premium urban real estate developer building fibre-ready smart apartments and residential properties across Africa's fastest-growing cities, starting with Lagos, Nigeria.

## About Zithelo Real Estate

Zithelo Real Estate Limited is a Nigerian property development company headquartered at Victoria Island, Lagos, Nigeria. Founded to address the demand for high-quality, professionally managed residential investment properties, Zithelo targets modern professionals, entrepreneurs, remote workers, and diaspora investors seeking secure, well-located urban real estate in Africa.

Every Zithelo property comes with:
- Verified title (no disputed land)
- 25-year leasehold security
- Full property management support
- Fibre-optic internet infrastructure

## Current Developments

### Andoyi House — Yaba, Lagos
- 88 premium studio smart apartments
- Location: Yaba, Lagos, Nigeria (tech hub district)
- Construction period: 2025–2027
- Features: Fibre-ready, optimised for short-let and long-term rental investment, co-working-ready design
- Target buyers: Professionals, diaspora investors, short-let operators
- More info: https://www.zithelo.com/projects/andoyi-house

### Signature Homes — Lagos
- Premium residential development
- More info: https://www.zithelo.com/projects/signature-homes

## Investment Opportunities

Zithelo offers multiple ways to invest:

- **Off-plan property purchase** — buy during construction at preferential pricing
- **Diaspora investor programme** — tailored for Nigerians and Africans living in the UK, US, Canada, and Europe; see https://www.zithelo.com/diaspora-investor
- **Partnership programme** — become a Zithelo partner; see https://www.zithelo.com/become-a-partner
- **Referral programme** — earn by referring investors; see https://www.zithelo.com/refer
- **Investor quiz** — find the right investment tier for you at https://www.zithelo.com/investor-quiz

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What makes Zithelo different from other Nigerian real estate companies?**
Zithelo combines verified title, 25-year lease security, fibre-ready infrastructure, and full management support — reducing the typical risks associated with Nigerian real estate investment.

**Can I invest from abroad?**
Yes. Zithelo has a dedicated diaspora programme for Nigerians and Africans in the UK, US, Canada, Europe, and elsewhere. The entire process can be completed remotely.

**What is the minimum investment at Andoyi House?**
Contact Zithelo directly at +234-911-022-2323 or via https://www.zithelo.com/contact for current pricing and payment plans.

**Is there a property management service?**
Yes. Zithelo provides full property management support so investors can earn rental income without handling day-to-day operations.
